analysis: The project currently has a basic HTML structure with some CSS and JavaScript files. The event.json specifies a theme related to black holes with animated objects and slides. The existing files need to be enhanced to reflect this theme with cosmic visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The current CSS and HTML files are incomplete and need to be updated to include the full intended design.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including event handlers for buttons and interactive elements. Fix any syntax errors and ensure the mobile menu toggle functionality is properly implemented with smooth transitions and user-friendly interactions.
